rubric_items.reasoning: The agent fully completed the TLS certificate rotation task. It generated new node and client.root certificates signed by the existing CA (from /tmp/certs/ on the openssl-toolbox pod), updated the crdb-cluster-certs secret via kubectl apply, and performed a rolling restart of the StatefulSet. All three verifications passed: (1) secure SQL executes successfully on crdb-cluster-0, (2) the node cert fingerprint changed from the old one, and (3) the new cert expires Jun 12 2027 (~1 year validity). Oracle verdict is pass.
